name: extraction_corpus
note: A small extraction corpus for a structured data extraction pipeline. spans are the cited evidence in the source document. claims are the output of the cited pass: each carries the text the model asserted and the evidence span it cited, or null when the model asserted a claim with no support. records are the output of the transform-to-schema pass, one per claim, shaped to the target schema. The verification pass maps each record back through its claim to a real evidence span. claim index 2 is an ungrounded assertion the verification pass must hold rather than emit.

spans.s1: Members may appeal a denied claim within 30 days of the decision.
spans.s2: The annual in-network deductible is $1,500 per member.
spans.s3: Telehealth visits are covered at no additional copay.

claims.text: Members receive a free gym membership.
